ayahs.arabic: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qad aflaha almu/minoon
ayahs.translation: Certainly will the believers have succeeded:

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى صَلَاتِهِمْ خَـٰشِعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena hum fee salatihimkhashiAAoon
ayahs.translation: They who are during their prayer humbly intent

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَنِ ٱللَّغْوِ مُعْرِضُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wallatheena hum AAani allaghwimuAAridoon
ayahs.translation: And they who turn away from ill speech

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِلزَّكَوٰةِ فَـٰعِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wallatheena hum lizzakatifaAAiloon
ayahs.translation: And they who are observant of zakāh

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِفُرُوجِهِمْ حَـٰفِظُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wallatheena hum lifuroojihim hafithoon
ayahs.translation: And they who guard their private parts

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزْوَٰجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَـٰنُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa AAala azwajihim awma malakat aymanuhum fa-innahum ghayru maloomeen
ayahs.translation: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess,[947] for indeed, they will not be blamed -

ayahs.arabic: فَمَنِ ٱبْتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْعَادُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Famani ibtagha waraa thalikafaola-ika humu alAAadoon
ayahs.translation: But whoever seeks beyond that, then those are the transgressors -

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِأَمَـٰنَـٰتِهِمْ وَعَهْدِهِمْ رَٰعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wallatheena hum li-amanatihimwaAAahdihim raAAoon
ayahs.translation: And they who are to their trusts and their promises attentive

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَوَٰتِهِمْ يُحَافِظُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wallatheena hum AAala salawatihimyuhafithoon
ayahs.translation: And they who carefully maintain their prayers -

ayahs.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْوَٰرِثُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ola-ika humu alwarithoon
ayahs.translation: Those are the inheritors

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَرِثُونَ ٱلْفِرْدَوْسَ هُمْ فِيهَا خَـٰلِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena yarithoona alfirdawsa humfeeha khalidoon
ayahs.translation: Who will inherit al-Firdaus.[948] They will abide therein eternally.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن سُلَـٰلَةٍ مِّن طِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad khalaqna al-insana minsulalatin min teen
ayahs.translation: And certainly did We create man from an extract of clay.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَـٰهُ نُطْفَةً فِى قَرَارٍ مَّكِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma jaAAalnahu nutfatan feeqararin makeen
ayahs.translation: Then We placed him as a sperm-drop[949] in a firm lodging [i.e., the womb].

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ خَلَقْنَا ٱلنُّطْفَةَ عَلَقَةً فَخَلَقْنَا ٱلْعَلَقَةَ مُضْغَةً فَخَلَقْنَا ٱلْمُضْغَةَ عِظَـٰمًا فَكَسَوْنَا ٱلْعِظَـٰمَ لَحْمًا ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَـٰهُ خَلْقًا ءَاخَرَ ۚ فَتَبَارَكَ ٱللَّهُ أَحْسَنُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma khalaqna annutfataAAalaqatan fakhalaqna alAAalaqata mudghatanfakhalaqna almudghata AAithamanfakasawna alAAithama lahmanthumma ansha/nahu khalqan akhara fatabarakaAllahu ahsanu alkhaliqeen
ayahs.translation: Then We made the sperm-drop into a clinging clot, and We made the clot into a lump [of flesh], and We made [from] the lump, bones, and We covered the bones with flesh; then We developed him into another creation. So blessed is Allāh, the best of creators.[950]

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُم بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَيِّتُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma innakum baAAda thalikalamayyitoon
ayahs.translation: Then indeed, after that you are to die.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ تُبْعَثُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma innakum yawma alqiyamatitubAAathoon
ayahs.translation: Then indeed you, on the Day of Resurrection, will be resurrected.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعَ طَرَآئِقَ وَمَا كُنَّا عَنِ ٱلْخَلْقِ غَـٰفِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad khalaqna fawqakum sabAAa tara-iqawama kunna AAani alkhalqi ghafileen
ayahs.translation: And We have created above you seven layered heavens, and never have We been of [Our] creation unaware.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۢ بِقَدَرٍ فَأَسْكَنَّـٰهُ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰ ذَهَابٍۭ بِهِۦ لَقَـٰدِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waanzalna mina assama-imaan biqadarin faaskannahu fee al-ardiwa-inna AAala thahabin bihi laqadiroon
ayahs.translation: And We have sent down rain from the sky in a measured amount and settled it in the earth. And indeed, We are Able to take it away.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَنشَأْنَا لَكُم بِهِۦ جَنَّـٰتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنَـٰبٍ لَّكُمْ فِيهَا فَوَٰكِهُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faansha/na lakum bihi jannatinmin nakheelin waaAAnabin lakum feeha fawakihukatheeratun waminha ta/kuloon
ayahs.translation: And We brought forth for you thereby gardens of palm trees and grapevines in which for you are abundant fruits and from which you eat.

ayahs.arabic: وَشَجَرَةً تَخْرُجُ مِن طُورِ سَيْنَآءَ تَنۢبُتُ بِٱلدُّهْنِ وَصِبْغٍ لِّلْـَٔاكِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Washajaratan takhruju min toori saynaatanbutu bidduhni wasibghin lilakileen
ayahs.translation: And [We brought forth] a tree issuing from Mount Sinai which produces oil and food [i.e., olives] for those who eat.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ لَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَنْعَـٰمِ لَعِبْرَةً ۖ نُّسْقِيكُم مِّمَّا فِى بُطُونِهَا وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا مَنَـٰفِعُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-inna lakum fee al-anAAamilaAAibratan nusqeekum mimma fee butoonihawalakum feeha manafiAAu katheeratun waminhata/kuloon
ayahs.translation: And indeed, for you in livestock is a lesson. We give you drink from that which is in their bellies, and for you in them are numerous benefits, and from them you eat.

ayahs.arabic: وَعَلَيْهَا وَعَلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ تُحْمَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: WaAAalayha waAAala alfulki tuhmaloon
ayahs.translation: And upon them and on ships you are carried.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ فَقَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَـٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ ۖ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad arsalna noohan ilaqawmihi faqala ya qawmi oAAbudoo Allaha malakum min ilahin ghayruhu afala tattaqoon
ayahs.translation: And We had certainly sent Noah to his people, and he said, "O my people, worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him?"

ayahs.arabic: فَقَالَ ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن قَوْمِهِۦ مَا هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يُرِيدُ أَن يَتَفَضَّلَ عَلَيْكُمْ وَلَوْ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ لَأَنزَلَ مَلَـٰٓئِكَةً مَّا سَمِعْنَا بِهَـٰذَا فِىٓ ءَابَآئِنَا ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faqala almalao allatheenakafaroo min qawmihi ma hatha illa basharunmithlukum yureedu an yatafaddala AAalaykum walaw shaaAllahu laanzala mala-ikatan ma samiAAnabihatha fee aba-ina al-awwaleen
ayahs.translation: But the eminent among those who disbelieved from his people said, "This is not but a man like yourselves who wishes to take precedence over you; and if Allāh had willed [to send a messenger], He would have sent down angels. We have not heard of this among our forefathers.

ayahs.arabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا رَجُلٌۢ بِهِۦ جِنَّةٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوا۟ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: In huwa illa rajulun bihi jinnatunfatarabbasoo bihi hatta heen
ayahs.translation: He is not but a man possessed with madness, so wait concerning him for a time."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi onsurnee bimakaththaboon
ayahs.translation: [Noah] said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me."

ayahs.arabic: فَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِ أَنِ ٱصْنَعِ ٱلْفُلْكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا وَوَحْيِنَا فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَمْرُنَا وَفَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ ۙ فَٱسْلُكْ فِيهَا مِن كُلٍّ زَوْجَيْنِ ٱثْنَيْنِ وَأَهْلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلْقَوْلُ مِنْهُمْ ۖ وَلَا تُخَـٰطِبْنِى فِى ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ ۖ إِنَّهُم مُّغْرَقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faawhayna ilayhi ani isnaAAialfulka bi-aAAyunina wawahyina fa-ithajaa amruna wafara attannooru faslukfeeha min kullin zawjayni ithnayni waahlaka illaman sabaqa AAalayhi alqawlu minhum wala tukhatibneefee allatheena thalamoo innahum mughraqoon
ayahs.translation: So We inspired to him, "Construct the ship under Our observation and Our inspiration, and when Our command comes and the oven overflows,[951] put into it [i.e., the ship] from each [creature] two mates and your family, except him for whom the decree [of destruction] has proceeded. And do not address Me concerning those who have wronged; indeed, they are to be drowned.

ayahs.arabic: فَإِذَا ٱسْتَوَيْتَ أَنتَ وَمَن مَّعَكَ عَلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ فَقُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى نَجَّىٰنَا مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-itha istawayta anta waman maAAakaAAala alfulki faquli alhamdu lillahi allatheenajjana mina alqawmi aththalimeen
ayahs.translation: And when you have boarded the ship, you and those with you, then say, 'Praise to Allāh who has saved us from the wrongdoing people.'

ayahs.arabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ أَنزِلْنِى مُنزَلًا مُّبَارَكًا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلْمُنزِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqul rabbi anzilnee munzalan mubarakanwaanta khayru almunzileen
ayahs.translation: And say, 'My Lord, let me land at a blessed landing place, and You are the best to accommodate [us].'"

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَـٰتٍ وَإِن كُنَّا لَمُبْتَلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatinwa-in kunna lamubtaleen
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that are signs, and indeed, We are ever testing [Our servants].

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَا مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ قَرْنًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma ansha/na min baAAdihim qarnan akhareen
ayahs.translation: Then We produced after them a generation of others.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَرْسَلْنَا فِيهِمْ رَسُولًا مِّنْهُمْ أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَـٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ ۖ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faarsalna feehim rasoolan minhum anioAAbudoo Allaha ma lakum min ilahin ghayruhuafala tattaqoon
ayahs.translation: And We sent among them a messenger[952] from themselves, [saying], "Worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him?"

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِن قَوْمِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِلِقَآءِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ وَأَتْرَفْنَـٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا مَا هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يَأْكُلُ مِمَّا تَأْكُلُونَ مِنْهُ وَيَشْرَبُ مِمَّا تَشْرَبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqala almalao min qawmihi allatheenakafaroo wakaththaboo biliqa-i al-akhiratiwaatrafnahum fee alhayati addunyama hatha illa basharun mithlukum ya/kulumimma ta/kuloona minhu wayashrabu mimma tashraboon
ayahs.translation: And the eminent among his people who disbelieved and denied the meeting of the Hereafter while We had given them luxury in the worldly life said, "This is not but a man like yourselves. He eats of that from which you eat and drinks of what you drink.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَئِنْ أَطَعْتُم بَشَرًا مِّثْلَكُمْ إِنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَّخَـٰسِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wala-in ataAAtum basharan mithlakuminnakum ithan lakhasiroon
ayahs.translation: And if you should obey a man like yourselves, indeed, you would then be losers.

ayahs.arabic: أَيَعِدُكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ إِذَا مِتُّمْ وَكُنتُمْ تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَنَّكُم مُّخْرَجُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: AyaAAidukum annakum itha mittumwakuntum turaban waAAithaman annakummukhrajoon
ayahs.translation: Does he promise you that when you have died and become dust and bones that you will be brought forth [once more]?

ayahs.arabic: ۞ هَيْهَاتَ هَيْهَاتَ لِمَا تُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hayhata hayhata limatooAAadoon
ayahs.translation: How far, how far, is that which you are promised.[953]

ayahs.arabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا ٱلدُّنْيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحْيَا وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَبْعُوثِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: In hiya illa hayatunaaddunya namootu wanahya wamanahnu bimabAAootheen
ayahs.translation: It [i.e., life] is not but our worldly life - we die and live, but we will not be resurrected.

ayahs.arabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا رَجُلٌ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا وَمَا نَحْنُ لَهُۥ بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: In huwa illa rajulun iftaraAAala Allahi kathiban wama nahnulahu bimu/mineen
ayahs.translation: He is not but a man who has invented a lie about Allāh, and we will not believe him."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi onsurnee bimakaththaboon
ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ عَمَّا قَلِيلٍ لَّيُصْبِحُنَّ نَـٰدِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala AAamma qaleelin layusbihunnanadimeen
ayahs.translation: [Allāh] said, "After a little, they will surely become regretful."

ayahs.arabic: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ بِٱلْحَقِّ فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ غُثَآءً ۚ فَبُعْدًا لِّلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faakhathat-humu assayhatubilhaqqi fajaAAalnahum ghuthaanfabuAAdan lilqawmi aththalimeen
ayahs.translation: So the shriek[954] seized them in truth,[955] and We made them as [plant] stubble. Then away with the wrongdoing people.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَا مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ قُرُونًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma ansha/na min baAAdihimquroonan akhareen
ayahs.translation: Then We produced after them other generations.

ayahs.arabic: مَا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma tasbiqu min ommatin ajalahawama yasta/khiroon
ayahs.translation: No nation will precede its time [of termination], nor will they remain [thereafter].

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلَنَا تَتْرَا ۖ كُلَّ مَا جَآءَ أُمَّةً رَّسُولُهَا كَذَّبُوهُ ۚ فَأَتْبَعْنَا بَعْضَهُم بَعْضًا وَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ أَحَادِيثَ ۚ فَبُعْدًا لِّقَوْمٍ لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma arsalna rusulana tatrakulla ma jaa ommatan rasooluha kaththaboohufaatbaAAna baAAdahum baAAdan wajaAAalnahumahadeetha fabuAAdan liqawmin la yu/minoon
ayahs.translation: Then We sent Our messengers in succession. Every time there came to a nation its messenger, they denied him, so We made them follow one another [to destruction], and We made them narrations.[956] So away with a people who do not believe.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ وَأَخَاهُ هَـٰرُونَ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا وَسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma arsalna moosa waakhahuharoona bi-ayatina wasultaninmubeen
ayahs.translation: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and a clear authority[957]

ayahs.arabic: إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَإِي۟هِۦ فَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا عَالِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ila firAAawna wamala-ihi fastakbaroowakanoo qawman AAaleen
ayahs.translation: To Pharaoh and his establishment, but they were arrogant and were a haughty people.

ayahs.arabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ لِبَشَرَيْنِ مِثْلِنَا وَقَوْمُهُمَا لَنَا عَـٰبِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faqaloo anu/minu libasharayni mithlinawaqawmuhuma lana AAabidoon
ayahs.translation: They said, "Should we believe two men like ourselves while their people are for us in servitude?"

ayahs.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَكَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْمُهْلَكِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fakaththaboohuma fakanoomina almuhlakeen
ayahs.translation: So they denied them and were of those destroyed.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad atayna moosaalkitaba laAAallahum yahtadoon
ayahs.translation: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture that perhaps they[958] would be guided.

ayahs.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱبْنَ مَرْيَمَ وَأُمَّهُۥٓ ءَايَةً وَءَاوَيْنَـٰهُمَآ إِلَىٰ رَبْوَةٍ ذَاتِ قَرَارٍ وَمَعِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: WajaAAalna ibna maryama waommahu ayatanwaawaynahuma ila rabwatin thatiqararin wamaAAeen
ayahs.translation: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level [areas] and flowing water.

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلرُّسُلُ كُلُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلطَّيِّبَـٰتِ وَٱعْمَلُوا۟ صَـٰلِحًا ۖ إِنِّى بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ عَلِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Ya ayyuha arrusulukuloo mina attayyibati waAAmaloo salihaninnee bima taAAmaloona AAaleem
ayahs.translation: [Allāh said], "O messengers, eat from the good foods and work righteousness. Indeed I, of what you do, am Knowing.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦٓ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وَٰحِدَةً وَأَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمْ فَٱتَّقُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-inna hathihi ommatukum ommatan wahidatanwaana rabbukum fattaqoon
ayahs.translation: And indeed this, your religion, is one religion,[959] and I am your Lord, so fear Me."

ayahs.arabic: فَتَقَطَّعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ زُبُرًا ۖ كُلُّ حِزْبٍۭ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ فَرِحُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: FataqattaAAoo amrahum baynahumzuburan kullu hizbin bima ladayhim farihoon
ayahs.translation: But they [i.e., the people] divided their religion among them into portions [i.e., sects] - each faction, in what it has,[960] rejoicing.

ayahs.arabic: فَذَرْهُمْ فِى غَمْرَتِهِمْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Fatharhum fee ghamratihim hattaheen
ayahs.translation: So leave them in their confusion for a time.

ayahs.arabic: أَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّمَا نُمِدُّهُم بِهِۦ مِن مَّالٍ وَبَنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ayahsaboona annama numidduhumbihi min malin wabaneen
ayahs.translation: Do they think that what We extend to them of wealth and children

ayahs.arabic: نُسَارِعُ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْخَيْرَٰتِ ۚ بَل لَّا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: NusariAAu lahum fee alkhayratibal la yashAAuroon
ayahs.translation: Is [because] We hasten for them good things? Rather, they do not perceive.[961]

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ خَشْيَةِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna allatheena hum min khashyatirabbihim mushfiqoon
ayahs.translation: Indeed, they who are apprehensive from fear of their Lord

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِـَٔايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wallatheena hum bi-ayatirabbihim yu/minoon
ayahs.translation: And they who believe in the signs of their Lord

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِرَبِّهِمْ لَا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wallatheena hum birabbihim layushrikoon
ayahs.translation: And they who do not associate anything with their Lord

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْتُونَ مَآ ءَاتَوا۟ وَّقُلُوبُهُمْ وَجِلَةٌ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ رَٰجِعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wallatheena yu/toona maataw waquloobuhum wajilatun annahum ila rabbihim rajiAAoon
ayahs.translation: And they who give what they give while their hearts are fearful[962] because they will be returning to their Lord -

ayahs.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ يُسَـٰرِعُونَ فِى ٱلْخَيْرَٰتِ وَهُمْ لَهَا سَـٰبِقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ola-ika yusariAAoona feealkhayrati wahum laha sabiqoon
ayahs.translation: It is those who hasten to good deeds, and they outstrip [others] therein.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۖ وَلَدَيْنَا كِتَـٰبٌ يَنطِقُ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wala nukallifu nafsan illawusAAaha waladayna kitabun yantiqu bilhaqqiwahum la yuthlamoon
ayahs.translation: And We charge no soul except [with that within] its capacity, and with Us is a record which speaks with truth; and they will not be wronged.

ayahs.arabic: بَلْ قُلُوبُهُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍ مِّنْ هَـٰذَا وَلَهُمْ أَعْمَـٰلٌ مِّن دُونِ ذَٰلِكَ هُمْ لَهَا عَـٰمِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Bal quloobuhum fee ghamratin min hathawalahum aAAmalun min dooni thalika hum lahaAAamiloon
ayahs.translation: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have [evil] deeds besides that [i.e., disbelief] which they are doing,

ayahs.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَخَذْنَا مُتْرَفِيهِم بِٱلْعَذَابِ إِذَا هُمْ يَجْـَٔرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hatta itha akhathnamutrafeehim bilAAathabi itha hum yaj-aroon
ayahs.translation: Until when We seize their affluent ones with punishment,[963] at once they are crying [to Allāh] for help.

ayahs.arabic: لَا تَجْـَٔرُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ ۖ إِنَّكُم مِّنَّا لَا تُنصَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: La taj-aroo alyawma innakum minnala tunsaroon
ayahs.translation: Do not cry out today. Indeed, by Us you will not be helped.

ayahs.arabic: قَدْ كَانَتْ ءَايَـٰتِى تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْكُمْ فَكُنتُمْ عَلَىٰٓ أَعْقَـٰبِكُمْ تَنكِصُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qad kanat ayatee tutlaAAalaykum fakuntum AAala aAAqabikum tankisoon
ayahs.translation: My verses had already been recited to you, but you were turning back on your heels

ayahs.arabic: مُسْتَكْبِرِينَ بِهِۦ سَـٰمِرًا تَهْجُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Mustakbireena bihi samiran tahjuroon
ayahs.translation: In arrogance regarding it,[964] conversing by night, speaking evil.

ayahs.arabic: أَفَلَمْ يَدَّبَّرُوا۟ ٱلْقَوْلَ أَمْ جَآءَهُم مَّا لَمْ يَأْتِ ءَابَآءَهُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Afalam yaddabbaroo alqawla am jaahumma lam ya/ti abaahumu al-awwaleen
ayahs.translation: Then have they not reflected over the word [i.e., the Qur’ān], or has there come to them that which had not come to their forefathers?

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ لَمْ يَعْرِفُوا۟ رَسُولَهُمْ فَهُمْ لَهُۥ مُنكِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Am lam yaAArifoo rasoolahum fahum lahumunkiroon
ayahs.translation: Or did they not know their Messenger, so they are toward him disacknowledging?

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ بِهِۦ جِنَّةٌۢ ۚ بَلْ جَآءَهُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَأَكْثَرُهُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كَـٰرِهُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Am yaqooloona bihi jinnatun bal jaahumbilhaqqi waaktharuhum lilhaqqi karihoon
ayahs.translation: Or do they say, "In him is madness"? Rather, he brought them the truth, but most of them, to the truth, are averse.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَوِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلْحَقُّ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ لَفَسَدَتِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَن فِيهِنَّ ۚ بَلْ أَتَيْنَـٰهُم بِذِكْرِهِمْ فَهُمْ عَن ذِكْرِهِم مُّعْرِضُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walawi ittabaAAa alhaqqu ahwaahumlafasadati assamawatu wal-arduwaman feehinna bal ataynahum bithikrihim fahum AAanthikrihim muAAridoon
ayahs.translation: But if the Truth [i.e., Allāh] had followed their inclinations, the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them would have been ruined. Rather, We have brought them their message,[965] but they, from their message, are turning away.

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ خَرْجًا فَخَرَاجُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌ ۖ وَهُوَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰزِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Am tas-aluhum kharjan fakharajurabbika khayrun wahuwa khayru arraziqeen
ayahs.translation: Or do you, [O Muḥammad], ask them for payment? But the reward of your Lord is best, and He is the best of providers.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّكَ لَتَدْعُوهُمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-innaka latadAAoohum ila siratinmustaqeem
ayahs.translation: And indeed, you invite them to a straight path.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ عَنِ ٱلصِّرَٰطِ لَنَـٰكِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-inna allatheena layu/minoona bil-akhirati AAani assiratilanakiboon
ayahs.translation: But indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter are deviating from the path.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَلَوْ رَحِمْنَـٰهُمْ وَكَشَفْنَا مَا بِهِم مِّن ضُرٍّ لَّلَجُّوا۟ فِى طُغْيَـٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaw rahimnahum wakashafnama bihim min durrin lalajjoo fee tughyanihimyaAAmahoon
ayahs.translation: And even if We gave them mercy and removed what was upon them of affliction, they would persist in their transgression, wandering blindly.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَخَذْنَـٰهُم بِٱلْعَذَابِ فَمَا ٱسْتَكَانُوا۟ لِرَبِّهِمْ وَمَا يَتَضَرَّعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad akhathnahum bilAAathabifama istakanoo lirabbihim wama yatadarraAAoon
ayahs.translation: And We had gripped them with suffering [as a warning], but they did not yield to their Lord, nor did they humbly supplicate, [and will continue thus]

ayahs.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَابًا ذَا عَذَابٍ شَدِيدٍ إِذَا هُمْ فِيهِ مُبْلِسُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hatta itha fatahnaAAalayhim baban tha AAathabin shadeedin ithahum feehi mublisoon
ayahs.translation: Until when We have opened before them a door of severe punishment, immediately they will be therein in despair.

ayahs.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصَـٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wahuwa allathee anshaa lakumu assamAAawal-absara wal-af-idata qaleelan matashkuroon
ayahs.translation: And it is He who produced for you hearing and vision and hearts [i.e., intellect]; little are you grateful.

ayahs.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى ذَرَأَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wahuwa allathee tharaakum feeal-ardi wa-ilayhi tuhsharoon
ayahs.translation: And it is He who has multiplied you throughout the earth, and to Him you will be gathered.

ayahs.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ وَلَهُ ٱخْتِلَـٰفُ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ ۚ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wahuwa allathee yuhyeewayumeetu walahu ikhtilafu allayli wannahariafala taAAqiloon
ayahs.translation: And it is He who gives life and causes death, and His is the alternation of the night and the day. Then will you not reason?

ayahs.arabic: بَلْ قَالُوا۟ مِثْلَ مَا قَالَ ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Bal qaloo mithla ma qalaal-awwaloon
ayahs.translation: Rather,[966] they say like what the former peoples said.

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo a-itha mitnawakunna turaban waAAithamana-inna lamabAAoothoon
ayahs.translation: They said, "When we have died and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?

ayahs.arabic: لَقَدْ وُعِدْنَا نَحْنُ وَءَابَآؤُنَا هَـٰذَا مِن قَبْلُ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad wuAAidna nahnu waabaonahatha min qablu in hatha illa asateerual-awwaleen
ayahs.translation: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before; this is not but legends of the former peoples."

ayahs.arabic: قُل لِّمَنِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَن فِيهَآ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qul limani al-ardu waman feehain kuntum taAAlamoon
ayahs.translation: Say, [O Muḥammad], "To whom belongs the earth and whoever is in it, if you should know?"

ayahs.arabic: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِ ۚ قُلْ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Sayaqooloona lillahi qul afalatathakkaroon
ayahs.translation: They will say, "To Allāh." Say, "Then will you not remember?"

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ مَن رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ ٱلسَّبْعِ وَرَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qul man rabbu assamawatiassabAAi warabbu alAAarshi alAAatheem
ayahs.translation: Say, "Who is Lord of the seven heavens and Lord of the Great Throne?"

ayahs.arabic: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِ ۚ قُلْ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Sayaqooloona lillahi qul afalatattaqoon
ayahs.translation: They will say, "[They belong] to Allāh." Say, "Then will you not fear Him?"

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ مَنۢ بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَهُوَ يُجِيرُ وَلَا يُجَارُ عَلَيْهِ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qul man biyadihi malakootu kulli shay-inwahuwa yujeeru wala yujaru AAalayhi in kuntumtaAAlamoon
ayahs.translation: Say, "In whose hand is the realm of all things - and He protects while none can protect against Him - if you should know?"

ayahs.arabic: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِ ۚ قُلْ فَأَنَّىٰ تُسْحَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Sayaqooloona lillahi qul faannatusharoon
ayahs.translation: They will say, "[All belongs] to Allāh." Say, "Then how are you deluded?"

ayahs.arabic: بَلْ أَتَيْنَـٰهُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَإِنَّهُمْ لَكَـٰذِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Bal ataynahum bilhaqqiwa-innahum lakathiboon
ayahs.translation: Rather, We have brought them the truth, and indeed they are liars.

ayahs.arabic: مَا ٱتَّخَذَ ٱللَّهُ مِن وَلَدٍ وَمَا كَانَ مَعَهُۥ مِنْ إِلَـٰهٍ ۚ إِذًا لَّذَهَبَ كُلُّ إِلَـٰهٍۭ بِمَا خَلَقَ وَلَعَلَا بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma ittakhatha Allahumin waladin wama kana maAAahu min ilahin ithanlathahaba kullu ilahin bima khalaqa walaAAalabaAAduhum AAala baAAdin subhana AllahiAAamma yasifoon
ayahs.translation: Allāh has not taken any son, nor has there ever been with Him any deity. [If there had been], then each deity would have taken what it created, and some of them would have [sought to] overcome others. Exalted is Allāh above what they describe [concerning Him].

ayahs.arabic: عَـٰلِمِ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ فَتَعَـٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: AAalimi alghaybi washshahadatifataAAala AAamma yushrikoon
ayahs.translation: [He is] Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, so high is He above what they associate [with Him].

ayahs.arabic: قُل رَّبِّ إِمَّا تُرِيَنِّى مَا يُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qul rabbi imma turiyannee mayooAAadoon
ayahs.translation: Say, [O Muḥammad], "My Lord, if You should show me that which they are promised,

ayahs.arabic: رَبِّ فَلَا تَجْعَلْنِى فِى ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbi fala tajAAalnee fee alqawmi aththalimeen
ayahs.translation: My Lord, then do not place me among the wrongdoing people."

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّرِيَكَ مَا نَعِدُهُمْ لَقَـٰدِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-inna AAala an nuriyaka manaAAiduhum laqadiroon
ayahs.translation: And indeed, We are Able to show you what We have promised them.

ayahs.arabic: ٱدْفَعْ بِٱلَّتِى هِىَ أَحْسَنُ ٱلسَّيِّئَةَ ۚ نَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَصِفُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: IdfaAA billatee hiya ahsanu assayyi-atanahnu aAAlamu bima yasifoon
ayahs.translation: Repel, by [means of] what is best, [their] evil. We are most knowing of what they describe.

ayahs.arabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ هَمَزَٰتِ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqul rabbi aAAoothu bika min hamazatiashshayateen
ayahs.translation: And say, "My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the incitements of the devils,

ayahs.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ رَبِّ أَن يَحْضُرُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: WaaAAoothu bika rabbi an yahduroon
ayahs.translation: And I seek refuge in You, my Lord, lest they be present with me."

ayahs.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَ أَحَدَهُمُ ٱلْمَوْتُ قَالَ رَبِّ ٱرْجِعُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Hatta itha jaa ahadahumualmawtu qala rabbi irjiAAoon
ayahs.translation: [For such is the state of the disbelievers] until, when death comes to one of them, he says, "My Lord, send me back

ayahs.arabic: لَعَلِّىٓ أَعْمَلُ صَـٰلِحًا فِيمَا تَرَكْتُ ۚ كَلَّآ ۚ إِنَّهَا كَلِمَةٌ هُوَ قَآئِلُهَا ۖ وَمِن وَرَآئِهِم بَرْزَخٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: LaAAallee aAAmalu salihanfeema taraktu kalla innaha kalimatun huwa qa-iluhawamin wara-ihim barzakhun ila yawmi yubAAathoon
ayahs.translation: That I might do righteousness in that which I left behind."[967] No! It is only a word he is saying; and behind them is a barrier until the Day they are resurrected.

ayahs.arabic: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَلَآ أَنسَابَ بَيْنَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَلَا يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-itha nufikha fee assoorifala ansaba baynahum yawma-ithin walayatasaaloon
ayahs.translation: So when the Horn is blown, no relationship will there be among them that Day, nor will they ask about one another.

ayahs.arabic: فَمَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faman thaqulat mawazeenuhu faola-ikahumu almuflihoon
ayahs.translation: And those whose scales are heavy [with good deeds] - it is they who are the successful.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ فِى جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waman khaffat mawazeenuhu faola-ikaallatheena khasiroo anfusahum fee jahannama khalidoon
ayahs.translation: But those whose scales are light - those are the ones who have lost their souls, [being] in Hell, abiding eternally.

ayahs.arabic: تَلْفَحُ وُجُوهَهُمُ ٱلنَّارُ وَهُمْ فِيهَا كَـٰلِحُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Talfahu wujoohahumu annaruwahum feeha kalihoon
ayahs.translation: The Fire will sear their faces, and they therein will have taut smiles.[968]

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمْ تَكُنْ ءَايَـٰتِى تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْكُمْ فَكُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Alam takun ayatee tutlaAAalaykum fakuntum biha tukaththiboon
ayahs.translation: [It will be said], "Were not My verses recited to you and you used to deny them?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا غَلَبَتْ عَلَيْنَا شِقْوَتُنَا وَكُنَّا قَوْمًا ضَآلِّينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo rabbana ghalabatAAalayna shiqwatuna wakunna qawman dalleen
ayahs.translation: They will say, "Our Lord, our wretchedness overcame us, and we were a people astray.

ayahs.arabic: رَبَّنَآ أَخْرِجْنَا مِنْهَا فَإِنْ عُدْنَا فَإِنَّا ظَـٰلِمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbana akhrijna minhafa-in AAudna fa-inna thalimoon
ayahs.translation: Our Lord, remove us from it, and if we were to return [to evil], we would indeed be wrongdoers."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ ٱخْسَـُٔوا۟ فِيهَا وَلَا تُكَلِّمُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala ikhsaoo feeha walatukallimoon
ayahs.translation: He will say, "Remain despised therein and do not speak to Me.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ فَرِيقٌ مِّنْ عِبَادِى يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَآ ءَامَنَّا فَٱغْفِرْ لَنَا وَٱرْحَمْنَا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰحِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Innahu kana fareequn min AAibadeeyaqooloona rabbana amanna faghfirlana warhamna waanta khayru arrahimeen
ayahs.translation: Indeed, there was a party of My servants who said, 'Our Lord, we have believed, so forgive us and have mercy upon us, and You are the best of the merciful.'

ayahs.arabic: فَٱتَّخَذْتُمُوهُمْ سِخْرِيًّا حَتَّىٰٓ أَنسَوْكُمْ ذِكْرِى وَكُنتُم مِّنْهُمْ تَضْحَكُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fattakhathtumoohumsikhriyyan hatta ansawkum thikree wakuntumminhum tadhakoon
ayahs.translation: But you took them in mockery to the point that they made you forget My remembrance, and you used to laugh at them.

ayahs.arabic: إِنِّى جَزَيْتُهُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ بِمَا صَبَرُوٓا۟ أَنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلْفَآئِزُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Innee jazaytuhumu alyawma bima sabarooannahum humu alfa-izoon
ayahs.translation: Indeed, I have rewarded them this Day for their patient endurance - that they are the attainers [of success]."

ayahs.arabic: قَـٰلَ كَمْ لَبِثْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ عَدَدَ سِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala kam labithtum fee al-ardiAAadada sineen
ayahs.translation: [Allāh] will say, "How long did you remain on earth in number of years?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَبِثْنَا يَوْمًا أَوْ بَعْضَ يَوْمٍ فَسْـَٔلِ ٱلْعَآدِّينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo labithna yawman aw baAAdayawmin fas-ali alAAaddeen
ayahs.translation: They will say, "We remained a day or part of a day; ask those who enumerate."

ayahs.arabic: قَـٰلَ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا ۖ لَّوْ أَنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala in labithtum illaqaleelan law annakum kuntum taAAlamoon
ayahs.translation: He will say, "You stayed not but a little - if only you had known.

ayahs.arabic: أَفَحَسِبْتُمْ أَنَّمَا خَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ عَبَثًا وَأَنَّكُمْ إِلَيْنَا لَا تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Afahasibtum annama khalaqnakumAAabathan waannakum ilayna la turjaAAoon
ayahs.translation: Then did you think that We created you uselessly and that to Us you would not be returned?"

ayahs.arabic: فَتَعَـٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: FataAAala Allahualmaliku alhaqqu la ilaha illa huwarabbu alAAarshi alkareem
ayahs.translation: So exalted is Allāh, the Sovereign,[969] the Truth;[970] there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Noble Throne.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَن يَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ لَا بُرْهَـٰنَ لَهُۥ بِهِۦ فَإِنَّمَا حِسَابُهُۥ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُفْلِحُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waman yadAAu maAAa Allahi ilahanakhara la burhana lahu bihi fa-innamahisabuhu AAinda rabbihi innahu la yuflihualkafiroon
ayahs.translation: And whoever invokes besides Allāh another deity for which he has no proof - then his account is only with his Lord. Indeed, the disbelievers will not succeed.

ayahs.arabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ وَٱرْحَمْ وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰحِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqul rabbi ighfir warhamwaanta khayru arrahimeen
ayahs.translation: And, [O Muḥammad], say, "My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful."
